title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXX. Games.
content:
[A game at ball.]

        Cuckoo, cherry tree,
        Catch a bird, and give it to me;
        Let the tree be high or low,
        Let it hail, rain, or snow.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCXX. Games." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
